overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through the futuristic Night City. The character navigates busy intersections, sidewalks, and covered walkways beneath towering skyscrapers adorned with neon advertisements and holographic billboards.

events.description: character crosses the wide intersection with yellow-striped crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking across the intersection alongside other pedestrians while vehicles pass by

notable_agents.action: white pickup truck driving through the intersection

entered.detail: futuristic cylindrical building with reflective glass facade
large vertical advertisement banner on building facade
wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes
elevated road signs suspended over the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a busy intersection in Night City with towering glass buildings. The character crosses a wide yellow-striped crosswalk while a white pickup truck passes by. Overhead traffic signs and large corporate billboards dominate the skyline.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past food stalls and street vendors

notable_agents.action: character in red jacket walking ahead of the camera

entered.detail: street vendors with colorful awnings and signage
construction barriers lining the edge of the sidewalk
wall covered in colorful street art and tags

segments.scene_description: Walking along a commercial sidewalk lined with food stalls on the right and red-white construction barriers on the left. The character passes by a graffiti-covered wall while moving toward an elevated pedestrian walkway in the distance.

events.description: enters the shadowed area beneath the large yellow overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass where sunlight mixes with shadows and neon lighting

entered.detail: massive angular concrete and yellow metal overpass covering the sidewalk
storefront with glowing purple and blue neon medical signage

segments.scene_description: The character enters a semi-covered area beneath a massive yellow overpass structure. The lighting shifts to a mix of shadows and neon glow from a medical clinic on the right. Street signs and graffiti become visible on the walls.

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the towering skyscrapers and overhead walkway systems above

agents.ego_description: character pauses to look up at the massive buildings and architectural details while standing in the street

entered.detail: massive cylindrical skyscraper with illuminated windows rising into the sky
elevated curved road structure winding between buildings
vents releasing steam at the top of buildings

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered area, the camera tilts upward to showcase the vertical scale of Night City. Massive glass towers, elevated highways, and intricate overhead walkway systems dominate the view against the bright sky, with steam vents visible at the building tops.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial street with neon signage

agents.ego_description: continuing down the covered street lined with glowing advertisements and vending machines

entered.detail: bright green and red neon advertisements on building facades
row of illuminated vending machines on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered commercial street beneath elevated walkways. Bright neon signs in green and red illuminate the left side while vending machines line the right. The environment feels enclosed and cyberpunk with mixed natural and artificial lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling urban intersection that gradually transitions into the enclosed, neon-lit corridors of a futuristic commercial district. It begins with the character crossing a wide yellow-striped crosswalk beneath towering glass buildings and corporate billboards as a white pickup truck passes by. As the character moves along a commercial sidewalk, the open street gives way to a path lined with food stalls and construction barriers, leading toward a semi-covered area beneath a massive yellow overpass where the lighting shifts into a mix of deep shadows and neon glows. The scene then opens briefly as the camera tilts upward to reveal the staggering vertical scale of the city's glass towers and elevated highways before descending back into a covered street. Finally, the environment becomes more enclosed, with the character walking between bright green and red neon signs and vending machines beneath a network of overhead walkways.
